source.name: StatsBomb Open Data
source.attribution: Data source: StatsBomb. Ratings and analysis are independent.
source.scope: Complete declared historical cohorts only; not a live five-league player feed.

methodology.lineup_trueskill: Sequential additive team-skill update using normalized minutes-played weights; every probability is recorded before its match update.
methodology.rapm: Match-level goal-difference ridge regression using normalized minutes weights, home-goal intercept, and a chronological final-quarter penalty selection.
methodology.interpretation: These estimates describe association with team outcomes within one declared season. They do not identify how a player contributed and should not be compared across cohorts.
